title: Add Bulk Items' name edit
excerpt: Hey! It would be great to have the option to select multiple items(subitems) and edit its names as when we duplicate more items they cannot be edited, so, you have to edit one by one and delete (copy) on each one.

posts.author: Igar (Igar Kvyatkouski)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! It would be great to have the option to select multiple items(subitems) and edit its names as when we duplicate more items they cannot be edited, so, you have to edit one by one and delete (copy) on each one.
